# Meeting Minutes

## Title
Teamtreffen Pilotplanung

## Agenda
- Demo-Status
- Datenbereinigung

## Decisions

- Keine explizit dokumentiert.

notes: Lecture notes: transformers use self-attention, tokenization affects efficiency, German compounds can fragment badly, evaluation must check factual grounding not just fluency. Ref: Vaswani et al. 2017.
target:
# Study Notes

## Topic
Transformer fundamentals for bilingual LLM design

## Key Concepts
- Self-attention
- Tokenization efficiency
- Factual grounding in evaluation

## Definitions
- Self-attention links tokens by contextual relevance.
- Tokenization controls how text is segmented into units for the model.

## Examples
- German compounds may fragment into too many tokens under a weak tokenizer.

## Summary
Transformers rely on self-attention, tokenizer quality affects efficiency, and evaluation should prioritize factual grounding in addition to fluency.

## References
- Vaswani et al. (2017).
